products.description: These barrel-shaft boots by Paris Texas are crafted from supple leather enriched with a croc-embossed texture that gives them a modern edge. The elegant, sleek profile rests atop a towering block heel for day-to-night comfort.

products.title: Black patent leather platform mules
products.description: Both effortless and exuberant, the Marina mules by Paris Texas marry gravity-defying heels with chunky platform soles. This new iteration is crafted from glossy patent leather in a deep black hue. The sleek open-toe upper ensures strategic support and a confident stride.
